---
title: "Isabella Margaretta Elizabeth Heathcote"
---

## Isabella Margaretta Elizabeth Heathcote

**Dates:** (d.1938)

**Maiden name:** (Walpole)

### Description

She married (15 Jun 1869) her cousin George Parker Heathcote.

### Letters

- [To Helena Mary Heathcote, July 25, 1899](../letters/3413_To_Helena_Mary_Heathcote.html)
- Letter from Sept 17 [1889?]
- Letter from Novr 4th [1886]
- Letter from Easter [5 April 1885]
- Letter from Easter day [5 April 1885]
- Letter from March 26th 1882
- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]
- Letter from Feb 20th [1871]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
